mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO user_message ( id, user_id, message_type, message_title, message_content, related_id, related_type, is_read, read_time, priority, expiry_time, created_time, updated_time ) VALUES
( #{item.id}, #{item.userId}, #{item.messageType}, #{item.messageTitle}, #{item.messageContent}, #{item.relatedId}, #{item.relatedType}, #{item.isRead}, #{item.readTime}, #{item.priority}, #{item.expiryTime}, #{item.createdTime}, #{item.updatedTime} )
